statement: Agents with terminal execution and file creation can build their own tools mid-session: custom MCP servers, shell scripts, or VS Code extensions. When a task requires capabilities beyond built-in tools, consider building a purpose-specific tool rather than working around the limitation.
publicSummary: Agents can build custom MCP servers or scripts mid-session to extend their own capabilities.
cautionNotes: Building tools adds complexity and time. Only justified when the task genuinely requires unavailable capabilities or the tool will be reused.
